latest_session.goal: Implement and verify the 'Convergence Forum' infrastructure for multi-agent debate.
latest_session.outcome: Implemented `run_forum.ps1` and integrated it into the `helpi` command set. Codex audited the script for architectural integrity, state management (forum_state.md), and PowerShell best practices. The Convergence Forum is now live for adversarial research debate.
files_touched: `run_forum.ps1` -- Created new orchestrator for multi-agent forums using a Blackboard model.
`helpi.ps1` -- Added `helpi 25` to expose the forum orchestrator.
`infrastructure.html` -- Added documentation for the Convergence Forum and Blackboard/Convergence mechanics.
